info.title: SQL Server Administrative Views as interactive offline report
info.description:
-o, --output=VALUE             Optional 'Reports\SQL Server' file name
-m, --mcp-server               MCP Server with stdio interaction protocol
-av, --append-version          Append SQL Server version to the above file name
-s, --server=VALUE             Specify local or remote SQL Server instance, allow multiple
-cs, --connection-string=VALUE Specify connection string, allow multiple
-all, --all-local-servers      Include all local SQL Servers and all Local DB instances
--include-system-queries       Include system queries
--include-master-database      Include master database
-v, --version                  Display version
-h, -?, --help
Output file name and/or path (-o|--output) may include placeholders: {InstanceName}, {Version}, and {Platform}
Instance (-s|--server) and Connection String (-cs|--ConnectionString) parameters may be included multiple times

options.name: --mcp-server
options.description: MCP Server with stdio interaction protocol

options.name: --append-version
options.description: Append SQL Server version to the above file name

options.name: --server
options.description: Specify local or remote SQL Server instance, allow multiple

options.name: --all-local-servers
options.description: Include all local SQL Servers and all Local DB instances

options.name: --help
options.description:
Output file name and/or path (-o|--output) may include placeholders: {InstanceName}, {Version}, and {Platform}
Instance (-s|--server) and Connection String (-cs|--ConnectionString) parameters may be included multiple times
